creator: venture37@geeklan.co.uk
text:
- Update to 2.7.1,1
 - Use variables instead of hard coding a path in the upgrade warning
 
 Port maintainer (gabor@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
 
 Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: update, diff: CVS)

Fix: 

===> Saving submitted PR, cleaning up
 ===> Done--PPkfvKvr5RhcWWS76iOcrMzctbt9g6yBXHtSkXi6vF0rL70G
Content-Type: text/plain; name="amavisd-new-2.7.1,1.patch"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="amavisd-new-2.7.1,1.patch"

 Index: Makefile
 ===================================================================
 RCS file: /usr/local/sandbox/ports/security/amavisd-new/Makefile,v
 retrieving revision 1.86
 diff -u -r1.86 Makefile
 --- Makefile	8 Aug 2011 11:19:48 -0000	1.86
 +++ Makefile	15 Jun 2012 23:10:06 -0000
 @@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
   # Based on amavisd ports makefile.
 
   PORTNAME=	amavisd-new
 -PORTVERSION=	2.7.0
 +PORTVERSION=	2.7.1
   PORTEPOCH=	1
   CATEGORIES=	security
   MASTER_SITES=	http://www.ijs.si/software/amavisd/ \
 @@ -17,7 +17,7 @@
   MAINTAINER=	gabor@FreeBSD.org
   COMMENT=	Performance-enhanced daemonized version of amavis-perl
 
 -LICENCE=	GPLv2
 +LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
   RUN_DEPENDS= 
 ${SITE_PERL}/${PERL_ARCH}/Unix/Syslog.pm:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/p5-Unix-Syslog 
 \
   		${SITE_PERL}/MIME/Parser.pm:${PORTSDIR}/mail/p5-MIME-Tools \
 @@ -222,8 +222,8 @@
   	@${ECHO} ""
   	@${ECHO} " **** UPGRADE WARNING:  SQL SCHEMA CHANGED ****"
   	@${ECHO} " If you are upgrading from version prior to 2.6.6"
 -	@${ECHO} " Hit ^c now and read /usr/ports/UPDATING section or"
 -	@${ECHO} " /usr/local/share/doc/amavisd-new/RELEASE_NOTES"
 +	@${ECHO} " Hit ^c now and read ${PORTSDIR}/UPDATING section or"
 +	@${ECHO} " ${DOCSDIR}/RELEASE_NOTES"
   	@read -p "Hit ^c now to stop, any key to continue: " -t 5 a || true
   	@${ECHO} ""
